title: Pan-Seared Fish with Egyptian Pilaf
description: A flavorful and healthy meal featuring pan-seared fish and a side of aromatic Egyptian pilaf.

ingredients.name: fish
ingredients.notes: Any firm white fish works well, such as tilapia or cod.

ingredients.name: buttery
ingredients.notes: Unsalted butter works best for this recipe.

instructions: Rinse the fish fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat the buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fish to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the Egyptian pilaf according to package instructions.
Serve the pan-seared fish with a side of Egyptian pilaf and a sprinkle of xtra.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro, if desired.
